---
title: "Introduction"
---

# About me

::: columns
::: {.column width="50%"}
Hi, I'm ***Firdauz***, an aspiring Data Science student. <br> <br> I am keen and curious for learning. I am a passionate individual with a keen interest in technology and writing. I enjoy exploring new ideas and sharing knowledge with others. <br> <br>

> "Good vibes ✌" ***-Ringo Star***
:::

::: {.column width="50%"}
![*Me/Firdauz*](img/me.jpg)
:::
:::

# Hobbies

### Playing Music 🎵

I enjoy playing various musical instruments, including the guitar. Music is a great way for me to relax and express myself creatively.

### Singing in the Shower 🎤

One of my favorite daily activities is singing in the shower. It's a fun way to release stress. Really.

### Rocking Out 🤘

I love rocking out to my favorite bands and songs. Whether it's at a live concert or just in my room, the energy and excitement of rock music are unmatched.

### Long Walks 🚶‍♂️

Taking long walks helps me clear my mind and stay fit. I enjoy exploring new trails and appreciating the beauty of nature.

### Motorcycling Around the Country 🏍️
I enjoy the thrill of motorcycling around the country, from TPE to BKE to PIE (but I prefer small secluded roads). It's a great way to explore new places, feel the wind and experience the freedom of the open road.
